betterquesting:10.desc:8:
Fairy Horses are the ultimate in horses as they can fly, equip chests, wear crystal armor, and can be dyed a different color, though this dying is permenant.

You obtain them by breeding a pegasus and unicorn together by using two essence of light on one. When they breed they both vanish and the fairy horse appears. Trying to breed two fairy horses together will also result in them fusing to a single fairy horse.
